Package tellui.component

Class TextArea

java.lang.Object
tellui.core.base.View
tellui.core.base.SpatialView
tellui.core.base.ContentView
tellui.core.base.Component
tellui.component.TextArea
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeyPressable, Scrollable, Visible
public final class TextArea extends Component implements KeyPressable, Scrollable
A multi-line text editing component with support for selection, scrolling, copy/paste, undo/redo, and keyboard navigation.

The component uses a buffered rendering approach for efficient text display and includes sophisticated cursor positioning and scrolling behavior.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class tellui.core.base.SpatialView

  • Constructor Details

    • TextArea

      public TextArea(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs a TextArea with specified position and dimensions. The text area is initialized with default styling and editing capabilities.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the text area's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the text area's top-left corner
      width - the width of the text area
      height - the height of the text area

    • TextArea

      public TextArea()
      Constructs a TextArea with default size and position. This is a convenience constructor for creating a text area.

  • Method Details

    • getInputFilter

      public InputFilter getInputFilter()
      Returns the current input filter used to validate characters.
      Returns:
      the input filter (never null)

    • setInputFilter

      public TextArea setInputFilter(InputFilter inputFilter)
      Sets the input filter used to validate characters entered into the text area.
      Parameters:
      inputFilter - the new input filter (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TextArea instance for chaining

    • setScrollsThumbColor

      public void setScrollsThumbColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the color of the scroll-bar thumbs.
      Parameters:
      color - the color for the scroll-bar thumbs

    • setScrollsBackgroundColor

      public void setScrollsBackgroundColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the background color of the scroll-bars.
      Parameters:
      color - the background color for the scroll-bars

    • setScrollsThumbStrokeColor

      public void setScrollsThumbStrokeColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the stroke color of the scroll-bar thumbs.
      Parameters:
      color - the stroke color for the scroll-bar thumbs

    • setOnTextChangedListener

      public void setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
      Sets the listener to be called when the text content changes.
      Parameters:
      onTextChangedListener - the listener for text changes
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the listener is null

    • setOnStyleChangedListener

      public void setOnStyleChangedListener(Listener onStyleChangedListener)
      Sets the listener to be called when the text style changes.
      Parameters:
      onStyleChangedListener - the listener for style changes
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the listener is null

    • getTabSize

      public int getTabSize()
      Gets the current tab size (number of spaces per tab).
      Returns:
      the current tab size

    • setTabSize

      public void setTabSize(int tabSize)
      Sets the tab size (number of spaces per tab). Valid values are between 1 and 8 inclusive.
      Parameters:
      tabSize - the tab size to set

    • getHandleDraggingSpeed

      public float getHandleDraggingSpeed()
      Gets the dragging speed for automatic scrolling when cursor is near edges.
      Returns:
      the current dragging speed

    • setHandleDraggingSpeed

      public void setHandleDraggingSpeed(float draggingSpeed)
      Sets the dragging speed for automatic scrolling when cursor is near edges. Minimum speed is 1.
      Parameters:
      draggingSpeed - the dragging speed to set

    • isFocused

      public boolean isFocused()
      Checks if the text area currently has keyboard focus.
      Returns:
      true if focused, false otherwise

    • setFocused

      public void setFocused(boolean focused)
      Sets whether the text area has keyboard focus.
      Parameters:
      focused - true to give focus, false to remove focus

    • isEditable

      public boolean isEditable()
      Checks if the text area is editable.
      Returns:
      true if editable, false if read-only

    • isBlank

      public boolean isBlank()
      Checks if text area is blank
      Returns:
      true if text area is blank, false if it's blank

    • setEditable

      public void setEditable(boolean editable)
      Sets whether the text area is editable.
      Parameters:
      editable - true to enable editing, false for read-only mode

    • setText

      public void setText(String... strings)
      Sets the text content of the text area. Each string in the array becomes a separate line.
      Parameters:
      strings - the lines of text to set

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Gets the text from TextArea
      Returns:
      the current text from TextArea

    • getTextColor

      public AbstractColor getTextColor()
      Gets the text color.
      Returns:
      the current text color

    • setTextColor

      public void setTextColor(AbstractColor textColor)
      Sets the text color.
      Parameters:
      textColor - the color for text rendering

    • getFont

      public processing.core.PFont getFont()
      Gets the current font.
      Returns:
      the current font, or null if using default

    • setFont

      public void setFont(processing.core.PFont font)
      Sets the font for text rendering.
      Parameters:
      font - the font to use for text

    • getTextSize

      public int getTextSize()
      Gets the text size in pixels.
      Returns:
      the current text size

    • setTextSize

      public void setTextSize(int textSize)
      Sets the text size in pixels. Minimum size is 4 pixels.
      Parameters:
      textSize - the text size to set

    • getLinesCount

      public int getLinesCount()
      Gets the number of lines in the text area.
      Returns:
      the count of lines

    • getCursorColor

      public AbstractColor getCursorColor()
      Gets the cursor color.
      Returns:
      the current cursor color

    • setCursorColor

      public void setCursorColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the cursor color.
      Parameters:
      color - the color for the cursor

    • getCursorWeight

      public float getCursorWeight()
      Gets the cursor stroke weight (thickness).
      Returns:
      the current cursor weight

    • setCursorWeight

      public void setCursorWeight(float weight)
      Sets the cursor stroke weight (thickness). Minimum weight is 1 pixel.
      Parameters:
      weight - the cursor weight to set

    • getSelectionColor

      public AbstractColor getSelectionColor()
      Gets the selection highlight color.
      Returns:
      the current selection color

    • setSelectionColor

      public void setSelectionColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the selection highlight color.
      Parameters:
      color - the color for text selection highlighting

    • mouseWheel

      public void mouseWheel(processing.event.MouseEvent mouseEvent)
      Handles mouse wheel scrolling. Scrolls the text area vertically when hovered, or scrolls scroll-bars when they are hovered.
      Specified by:
      mouseWheel in interface Scrollable
      Parameters:
      mouseEvent - the mouse wheel event

    • keyPressed

      public void keyPressed(processing.event.KeyEvent e)
      Handles key press events for text editing and navigation. Only processes keys when the text area is focused.
      Specified by:
      keyPressed in interface KeyPressable
      Parameters:
      e - the key event
